create.allow_retake_desc: Allow participants to retake this assessment

create.validation_question_text: Question must be at least 3 characters
create.validation_pg_options: All options (A, B, C, D) must be filled
create.question_hint: Supports basic HTML. Min. 3 characters after tags stripped.

create.video_url_hint: URL must start with http:// or https://
create.no_questions_yet: No questions yet. Click "Question" to add.
create.err_title_min: Title must be at least 5 characters
create.err_manual_name_field: At least 1 field with "name" label required
create.err_note_required: Fill in note if note is enabled

daftar_nama.content_subtitle: Manage name lists used when creating assessments
daftar_nama.header_subtitle: Manage name lists used when creating assessments. Maximum 3 lists.

daftar_nama.delete_confirm_msg: Name list "{{name}}" will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
daftar_nama.panel_names_placeholder: Type a name, press Enter to add
daftar_nama.validation_names_required: At least 1 name per section required

daftar_nama.name_too_long: List name must be at most {{max}} characters.
daftar_nama.custom_type_required: Custom type name must be at least 2 characters.
daftar_nama.empty_tab: Empty tab: {{names}}. Each tab must have at least 1 name.

landing.hero_subtitle: Create exams in minutes, auto-grade, and monitor student results in real-time. All from one platform.
landing.problems_subtitle: Conventional exam processes are full of hurdles that waste time and energy.
landing.problem1_desc: Creating questions one by one, printing paper, and distributing to students takes hours that could be spent teaching.
landing.problem2_desc: Grading hundreds of answer sheets manually risks errors and takes weeks before results can be announced.
landing.problem3_desc: Exam results scattered across Excel files, paper, and different folders — hard to analyze and use for learning decisions.
landing.solution_title: One platform that handles all your exam needs, from creation to analysis.
landing.solution1_desc: Intuitive exam creation wizard — just pick question types, set timing, and the exam is ready to share. No technical skills needed.
landing.solution2_desc: The system grades multiple-choice and fill-in answers instantly when students finish. No delay, no errors.
landing.solution3_desc: Monitor exam results live — see scores, answer distribution, and per-question analysis right after students submit.
landing.how_subtitle: From zero to results, just 3 easy steps.
landing.how_step1_desc: Use the wizard to compose questions, set duration and options. Done in minutes.
landing.how_step2_desc: Get a unique token to share with students. They start immediately without registration.
landing.how_step3_desc: Results appear in real-time on the dashboard. Analyze scores, time spent, and answer distribution.
landing.proof_subtitle: We are building a better exam platform. Be part of it from the start — join now and help shape AlbEdu with us.
landing.cta_desc: AlbEdu early access is now available. Sign up now and be the first user to shape this platform.
landing.solution_subtitle: One platform that handles all your exam needs, from creation to analysis.
landing.title: AlbEdu — Manage Online Exams, Hassle-Free

auth.login_feature_desc: Manage exams, monitor results, and improve education quality with a secure and easy-to-use platform.
auth.register_subtitle: Create an administrator account for your school or institution
auth.register_success_desc: Your admin account has been created. Please sign in with your email and password.
auth.forgot_subtitle: Enter your email to receive a password reset link
auth.forgot_success: Reset link has been sent to your email
auth.reset_subtitle: Create a new password for your account

err.account_exists: This email is already registered. Please log in or use a different email.
err.device_limit_reached: This device has reached the maximum allowed accounts. If this is a school or shared device, contact the administrator.
err.email_not_confirmed: Your account has not been verified. Please check your email and click the verification link before logging in.
err.expired_token: Login session has expired. Please log in again.
err.invalid_credentials: The email or password you entered is invalid. Please double-check and try again.
err.invalid_token: Invalid security session. Please repeat the process.
err.missing_preflight: Login session data not found. Please log in again.
err.missing_verification: Security verification could not be completed. Make sure the verification widget is visible on the page, wait for it to finish, then try again. If the widget does not appear, reload the page.
err.network_error: Connection to server failed. Please check your internet connection and try again.
err.password_mismatch: Password and confirmation password must match.
err.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
err.rate_limit_exceeded: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes before trying again.
err.reset_email_sent: If the email is registered, a password reset link has been sent to your inbox. Please check your email.
err.reset_failed: Failed to change password. Please try again.
err.reset_invalid_token: Invalid reset link. Please request a new password reset link.
err.reset_link_expired: The password reset link has expired. Please request a new link.
err.reset_rate_limited: Too many reset requests. Please wait a few minutes before trying again.
err.risk_check_unavailable: The system is busy. Please try again shortly.
err.security_mismatch: A device change was detected during login. Please start the login process again from the beginning.
err.too_many_requests: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
err.turnstile_expired: Security verification expired. Please try again.
err.turnstile_failed: Security verification failed. The system will retry automatically — if the problem persists, reload the page.
err.turnstile_network_error: Could not connect to Cloudflare verification service. Check your internet connection, disable any VPN/proxy, or try a different network. If the problem persists, switch your DNS to 1.1.1.1 or 8.8.8.8.
err.unauthorized: You do not have permission to perform this action.
err.unknown_error: An unknown error occurred. Please try again.
err.user_completion_failed: Failed to complete login. Please try again.
err.user_preflight_failed: Failed to prepare login. Please try again.
err.weak_password: Password is too weak. Please use a stronger password.

auth.already_logged_in_msg: You are already logged in. You will be redirected to your role's page.
auth.404_redirect_msg: Page not found. You will be redirected to the previous page in 5 seconds.

forgot.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email format.
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we will send you a link to reset your password.

reset.error_desc: The password reset link has expired or is invalid. Please request a new reset link.
reset.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
reset.password_mismatch: Password and confirmation do not match.
reset.success_desc: Your password has been updated. Please log in with your new password.
reset.subtitle_strong: Create a strong, secure password to protect your administrator account.

peserta.consent_intro: AlbEdu collects the following data when you take an assessment:

privacy.section_1_body: AlbEdu ("we") is committed to protecting the privacy of your personal data ("participant") in accordance with Indonesian Law No. 27 of 2022 on Personal Data Protection (UU PDP). This policy explains the data we collect, how we use it, and your rights regarding that data.
privacy.section_3_body: We process your data based on:
privacy.right_erase_desc: — Delete account and all related data.
privacy.section_5_body: We implement the following security measures:
privacy.section_8_body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. If there are material changes, we will notify you via email or in-app notification.
privacy.footer_note: You can request data access/deletion anytime. See full Privacy Policy.
